scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n server,client,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w electron"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w electron
scripts.build:prod: npm run sync-version && npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build:bundle -w server && npm run build:electron -w client && npm run build -w electron
scripts.dist: npm run build:prod && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win -c electron/electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build:prod && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --dir -c electron/electron-builder.json
